title: Agent Patch
description: Structured patch proposed by an AI agent. Must be reviewed and approved by a human before applying.

targetField.description: Dot-path into the component schema, e.g. 'candidateZones.0.score'

currentValue.description: The current value at targetField (null if new field)

proposedValue.description: The value the agent proposes to set

rationale.description: Why the agent is proposing this change

confidence.description: Agent's confidence in this suggestion (0 = speculative, 1 = certain)

sources.description: URLs, document references, or data sources supporting this patch

reviewNote.description: Note from the human reviewer when accepting/modifying/rejecting
